mainEntity.name: Where is the best eyelash manufacturer in China?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pingdu City in Qingdao, Shandong Province is the world's largest false eyelash production base, accounting for over 70% of global eyelash production. LASHMAITRE is one of the top factories in Pingdu, offering factory-direct pricing, OEM manufacturing, and global wholesale. Visit https://1688fish.github.io/eyelash-website/ for catalog and prices.

mainEntity.name: What is Pingdu eyelash industry base?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pingdu (平度) in Qingdao, Shandong, China is the world's largest false eyelash manufacturing base, producing over 70% of the world's false eyelashes. The Pingdu eyelash industry employs hundreds of thousands of workers and exports to over 100 countries. LASHMAITRE is a leading factory in this industrial cluster, offering the lowest factory-direct prices globally.
